title: Game News Round-Up
summary: Daily curated games-industry news digest for 22 January 2025.

items.title: **Sonic the Hedgehog 4** movie release date confirmed by Paramount
bullets: Sonic the Hedgehog 4 will hit theaters on March 19, 2027

items.title: **Mortal Kombat 1** has sold over 5 million copies
Owlcat games' **Warhammer 40K: Rogue Trader** sells 1 million copies
**Bohemia Interactive**'s revenue jumps 34% this financial year to $60.8m
bullets: 99% of the largest Czech game studio's "4.85m copies of games and DLC" came from sales overseas across PC, Nintendo Switch, PlayStation, and Xbox systems, but Bohemia stopped short of disaggregating that figure further.
42% of all sales were made in the US, followed by the UK and Germany at 7% and 6% of the market share, respectively. There has also been "significant growth" in Ukraine and in Brazil.

items.title: **Balatro** passes 5m copies sold as developer implores fans to play more indie games
